transcript.text:
An udon restaurant with 24 years of tradition
But they're more known for their fried rice
[Fried Rice]
[With egg and cheese]
[Mouthwatering]
[Let's eat]
[Huge portions]
Incredible
[Can't help but to laugh]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Apgujeong today
I came to this udon restaurant
They've been here for over 20 years
And their fried rice is very popular
It was so crowded and hectic earlier during lunch hours
So I waited a bit to come back

[Hana Udon]
Let's head in
Hello
I'm inside now
[Different types of fried rice]
Which one is the best?
They order the squid one a lot
Young people like the Cheese Bacon Kimchi Fried Rice
Well then 1 cheese bacon,
I want udon too
1 bowl of regular udon, 1 kimchi udon,
2 cheese bacon kimchi fried rice,
1 memil (cold buckwheat noodles),
And 1 donkatsu, please (pork cutlet)
[6 dishes...?]
[Cheese Bacon Kimchi Fried Rice]

[Donkatsu]
[Memil] (Cold Buckwheat Noodles)
[Udon Noodles]
[This is what they're known for!]
Thank you
Thank you
[All set]
Looks great
Check out the fried rice
Cheddar cheese on top
Fried rice with eggs
-Mix it all up right now -Oh, mix it now?
This is 2 servings? It's a lot
Doesn't look like it
They give you a lot of food in general
Even the udon pot right here is pretty big And it's filled

Donkatsu piece is huge too
The fried rice looks like 3~4 servings
Every table here ordered fried rice here
It's a udon restaurant, but they're known for their fried rice
Bon appetit Let's start with the fried rice first
The bottom has scorched rice
I can taste the crispiness with it
Delicious
The scorched rice on the bottom of the fried rice
It has a variety of vegetables
Bean sprouts, carrots, zucchini, etc
So it's almost like Bibimbap (mixed rice with vegetables)
A combination of Bibimbaap and fried rice
Udon
You can't wrong with udon
This is almost like kimchi stew

Nice and refreshing
I love udon
I love it
The noodles are bouncy
Nothing too special about the soup though A common udon soup
But the noodles are soft and bouncy
Lovely
I thought it was a regular udon But it has shrimp tempura
A lot of fishcakes with shrimp tempura And a whole egg
Lots of noodles too
All gone
A lot of noodles in here It's never-ending
A lot of fishcakes too Look at that
It's great
Next
Some donkatsu

A little taste
Tender
It's crispy
I've never seen a whole egg inside udon like this
Fried rice
Get some noodles
With tempura on top
Mini bowl of udon
I'm loving this spoon
Can I eat it like this?
Not really
Cold memil noodles
Mix it up
Tasty
The noodles are very tasty
I love eating cold noodles during the summer

Dip this in donkatsu too!
A whole new dish Donkatsu Udon Nabe
Shrimp tempura too
I enjoy soggy tempuras more
Soft and tasty
Just like ice cream
[She must be thirsty]
[Here] Thank you
It scrapes off easily
My grandma taught me this
Hold the bottom of the spoon like this
And scrape
Push it
Then all the crispy rice is yours
[Very nice to know...]
Soaked donkatsu

Not too soaked though
Just a little
It's so good
If you lay it on top like this It's crispy on the top and soft on the bottom
Crispy and moist at the same time
It's amazing
Not gaining any weight in the best part
Thank you
Try some cold noodle soup after taking a bite of the fried rice
That's delicious Even more flavorful
That amount of food...
Is almost for a company outing
But
Is there any difference between these and the plate memil noodles I had a couple of mukbangs ago?
[If you know, please write in the comments]
But must really love eggs

It was my first time seeing eggs in udon noodles
And also in cold memil noodles
Let's soak another one
It's really great like this
[More coke] Thank you
I get full after 1 can of coke
I don't get full without coke
[Is that why you drink sodas?]
[She's not human...]
We serve big potions
[We really do serve a lot of food]
Really though Udon had lots of noodles
And donkatsu was big
Even the fried rice
Reasons why their donkatsu is special?
They have it listed right over there

I like eating donkatsu with wasabi
Oh right I should've asked them for some
This is my last piece...
I love fishcakes
A lot of fishcakes in here
Egg
Soft
That was a great meal
Amazing...
It's like a group came to eat
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
